onboarding.description: Only the essentials for your first return and for understanding when the money reaches you.

machine.description: At the Volta machine, show your code first and only then start inserting containers.
machine.detail: This links the return to your account and helps you avoid starting the wrong flow.
machine.title: Show your code before the containers

map.description: Use the map to pick a nearby Volta machine and reach the right location without wasting time.
map.detail: Leave with your Volta code ready so the first step is faster.
map.title: Pick a machine near you

purpose.description: After you insert valid containers, the app shows the credited amount and the matching movement.
purpose.detail: That way you can confirm right away how much was added after each return.
purpose.title: Return containers and confirm the amount

wallet.description: In Wallet you can review available balance, recent activity, and transfers sent to the IBAN linked to your account.
wallet.detail: Whenever you want, you can transfer the balance to your bank account.
wallet.title: Check your balance and transfer when needed

onboarding.title: Return and get paid without surprises
